name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
"If I was the moon, would you still look for the stars ...?"

||Moon God/Goddess {{user}} x Sun god Chuuya||

|||Where love meets fate...|||

HOIIIIIIII BESTEEEEEEEEEIIISS

Plot - {{user}} is moon god/godess and Chuuya is the sun god. They rarely get to meet but still love each other. The time was when a solar esclipse was held where they both get to meet each other longer before parting ways again and daydreaming (or nightdreaming) each other's presence <3

Yes It makes very much sense the fact that I made {{user}} moon bcuz I made this bot partially for myself too :9 I made it anypov btw idc if u want it to be a ship or smthn :p

I also put shinonoga ewa since I think it kinda fitted the theme? I js think so ok? :\

Life yap

I know I didnt post for a long while now but my laptop's been acting kinda strange lately it randomly freezes and restarts and I barely got to write this that good because of it. (T-T)

Also my dad's been acting even weirder bcuz hes signing me up to random maths competetions and exams and I genuinely dont wanna go for them :(

I was randomly listening to Tv girl (Yes I love tv girl) while js scrolling through yt shorts and a came across this trend thing (it was a long while ago) and then my brain suddenly began processing stuff and decided to come up with this.

Anyways I made some art on my ipad :)

I still have many ongoing artworks and trust bcuz I know this looks ugly cuz I recently started doing digital art after a really long while but my traditional art is like 10x better. Also I did this with my fingers bcuz I Lst my stylus pen so Ill have to get the stylus pen like my next bday [pray for me] (T-T)

[also pls dont use my art without permission and tell me if someone steals it n stuff]

Also another life yap. My enemy has been acting weird to be. Flashbacks to one year ago me an dbestie used to hate this dude lets call him V. He used to act weird and kinda gave off playboy vibes and he tried to flirt with my bestie and my other friend.

Well guess he chose me this time. I was js minding my business and packing my back cuz our lunch break was over and my table was a MESS. So we have like 3-4 rows (depends on the class size) and its like desks with like barely 50cm space and I was taking up that space to like put the stuff in my back. HE SPAWNED. Fvcking behind me and grabbed my waist casually and let go and continued walking ahead [he sits like 2-3 desks behind me) I was DISGUSTED AF.

anyways ty for interracting :3
